title: Decorative Railings
description: Railings to decorate your balconies and terraces
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a033f0bbefec928807f3a7f2a7a02bb9a213d2ad.png)

Welcome to Decorative Railings, this mod adds a variety of stylish railings and functional handrails to your Minecraft world. Now you can decorate your buildings, balconies and terraces with wooden, stone, quartz and iron railings.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34dab8e54240f8cbf7098c65b42a062404c78697.png)

Black iron railings and handrails added

![Black iron railings and handrails added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e2c92e0fa41ca711128793b1c60fe83fb0e69a.png)




handrail for stairs

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e9aebf10a6a1da695a389e36028f13174024ad1.png)

To craft the objects you first have to go to the work table and with 2 planks of wood, iron, quartz or stone you will craft the half block, which by taking it to the stone cuter you will be able to craft the railings and handrails.

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c9e52b269fb30d60dd2edce5e440bc08700494e.png)
